67: W-Wait! Forgive me for speaking plain, huntress, but I fear we would only be a hindrance to <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/> when the fighting begins. Let us go to Hells' Lid by skiff and meet <If(PlayerParameter(4))>her<Else/>his</If> after the villain is subdued.
